342 J1C J1C_DEHYDRATED (J1C) Dehydrated/Output Exceeds Input CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - indicators of fluid status - dehydrated - output exceeds input in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
343 J1D J1D_INSUFF_FLUID (J1D) Insufficient Fluid CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - indicators of fluid status - insufficient fluid in last 3 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
